stemHtml: A pilot is planned to fly from Aberdeen Airport to London Heathrow. He/she receives the following ATC clearance: ‘Globe Air 123 is cleared to London Heathrow flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577.’ The correct response is…

options.a: “Globe Air 123 is cleared to London Heathrow flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577”.
options.b: “Cleared to London Heathrow flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577, Globe Air 123”.
options.c: “Globe Air 123 is cleared flight plan route, FL210, squawk 4577”.
options.d: “Cleared as filed, climb to FL210, squawk 4577, Globe Air 123”.
